channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Obstruction, 30th May
item.description:
This vehicle has been parked for over a week on the pavement and making other road users difficult to turn out of the road of Sandcliffe road. This has caused significant problems for dustman and other road users. The drivers window is down on the van it has 3 penalty notices on the window screen an yet still not been moved. It is appearing to be a hazard for road users an public footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembroke Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cylinder, 30th May
item.description:
There is an empty gas cylinder on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Johns Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin upended and rolled down hill, 30th May
item.description:
Rubbish bin removed and rolled down hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hill Crest, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned. Santander Bike, 30th May
item.description:
River View Walk. Please clear an abandoned Santander bike from grass area by Bridge to Broadmead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Winsford Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The walked shrubbery & trees are overgrown, 30th May
item.description:
The shrubs and trees are blocking the vision for pedestrians and other traffic users . The bed should have low level nice looking shrubs as this is now used as a dumping ground for debris discarded by passers by. A motorcyclist collided with a car this week and many people were saying the shrubbery needed cutting back or remove the bed all together as it’s busier now with the new Marks & Spencer store . It makes the area look an eyesore.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenwood Close, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgraceful series of potholes on Wavertree Rd, 30th May
item.description:
Just awful

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wavertree Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish- Kieth Miller Sports Pitch, 30th May
item.description:
Keith Miller pitch has overflowing rubbish, threatening public health & safety. Councils must clean streets; operators must keep areas safe (Suffolk TMO). Citations: gov.uk/local-street-clean, hse.gov.uk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground un maintained., 30th May
item.description:
The playground has fallen into a state of disrepair and presents a serious risk of injury to children and other members of the public. Issues include broken equipment, damaged flooring, exposed metal, loose bolts, broken fencing, sharp edges, etc.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sibthorpe Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish problem, 30th May
item.description:
Reporting again - rubbish is still a problem near this block if flats. When left out, foxes spread it all over the pavement . Or it is dumped? The street bin is also too full? Add notice about no fly tipping? It is a health hazard and nuisance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 251, Beckenham Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover collapsing at beginning of road, 30th May
item.description:
There are two drain covers on the pavement at the beginning of Sandford Road Bexleyheath, the Broadway end, the same side as the Sandford dentist surgery. One of these covers is broken and collapsing inwards and very likely will collapse if someone stands on it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandford Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing, 30th May
item.description:
Rubbish bin needs to be emptied.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kings Highway, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items dumped, 30th May
item.description:
Household items dumped by bin cupboard between Holford House & Wilmington Terrace

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tenda Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing, 30th May
item.description:
Bin overflowing and rubbish all around it across the common.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the green on the left. As you turn into marsham close, 30th May
item.description:
Dumped fence panels

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Marsham Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 dumped 30 cm nitrous oxide canisters, 30th May
item.description:
Online enquiry says these are not normal household waste and can be dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Bromley Common, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped cabinet, 30th May
item.description:
This cabinet has been dumped there for over a month. Looks awful

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Barham Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and litter, 30th May
item.description:
This has been like this for a week and is becoming increasingly more disgusting with the green area littered with trash from the overflowing bin, including fishy sushi leftovers which is unsanitary and a danger to people walking dogs and playing children.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes of gas canisters dumped on the side of the road, 30th May
item.description:
There are about 4 boxes full of nitrous oxide canisters that have just been dumped on the pavement of Lee Green
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willesden lane between Winchester ave and Tennyson road, 30th May
item.description:
Speed limit needs to be updated to match the rest of the road! Why is the only bit that is not 20 miles ? Cars speed like crazy only between that because ia 30 miles, there’s a school, a playground, à crossing and they do not care! It is very dangerous. Please change it to 20 miles like the rest of the area!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 50 Christchurch Avenue, 30th May
item.description:
Persistent fly tipping outside 50 Christchurch Avenue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
